what: SAMPLE: Fresh entry keyed to a file that exists; the auditor classifies it OK.
SAMPLE: Entry keyed to a path that no longer exists; classified STALE until re-keyed or marked obsoleted_by.
SAMPLE: Old entry with no verified date; classified AGING once it ages past the re-verification window.
SAMPLE: Same-age entry whose verified date was refreshed on a re-check; the refresh clears AGING.
SAMPLE: Special-path entry (domain); nothing on disk to check, so the auditor skips it.
SAMPLE: Entry with a dangling obsoleted_by pointer; reported under chain issues.
